truth_rule: Static package implementation never implies runtime qualification or release.

requirements.title: Immutable multimodal job and quality contract
RunPod phase lease storage and cost governor
Deterministic image QA and strict visual review
Golden-mask proposal refinement and QA system
Fast triage and primary multimodal reviewer tiers
Autonomous workflow inspection diagnosis and patching
Targeted bounded correction improvement and revert
Legacy AWS evidence lineage retained for audit only
Calibration disagreement bias and drift control
Current-production-pod capacity and dynamic model residency
Deterministic tool gateway and secret isolation
End-to-end autonomous shadow qualification and release
Self-hosted role package inventory and activation manifests
Promoted storage package and quarantined workflow qualification

release_requires: all requirement IDs represented in Items and Tracker
all applicable runtime and calibration evidence terminal and green
no blocked required role silently replaced by a weaker role
failure injection recovery replay security and cost gates pass
Codex integration authority records final acceptance
